title: Space/set: description:null patch silently ignored, not cleared
description: Trigger: Space/set update patch {"description": null} on a space that has a non-null description. Bad behavior: description is not cleared in the DB; response claims updated:true anyway. Root cause: update_space_fully(space_id, name, None, ...) treats description=None as 'don't touch', but Phase 2 of space_set collapses both 'not in patch' and 'explicitly null' to Option<&str>::None — they are indistinguishable at the call site. Fix: change update_space_fully's description param to Option<Option<&str>> where Some(None)=clear, Some(Some(s))=set, None=don't touch; update Phase 2 collection accordingly.
